text.title: Marketing Learnings Database Schema Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: schema overhead > value; track results inline instead
name a curator first; without one the DB will rot

branch.when: experiments_per_quarter >= 2 AND curator_named == true AND substrate == 'none'

conclusion.verdict: pick substrate (Notion / Airtable / Postgres / YAML); implement schema fields

branch.when: experiments_per_quarter >= 2 AND curator_named == true AND substrate != 'none'

conclusion.verdict: wire weekly review ritual; archive un-tagged entries after 14 days

example.trace: experiments_per_quarter >= 2 AND curator_named == true AND substrate != 'none' → conclusion ref="curator-weekly-review" verdict="wire weekly review ritual; archive un-tagged entries after 14 days"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
